narrative:
Miami Township U (precinct in Clermont County) has 670 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.2 percentage points.
